headline: HEAVY SLOP WARNING: SYNTHETIC FIVE-STAR FRONT SWAMPS THE APP STORE FLATS AS QUARTER-END REVIEW HARVEST PEAKS, BURYING HONEST RATINGS UNDER MANUFACTURED PRAISE
advisory: A dense band of fabricated product reviews has formed across consumer-facing storefronts ahead of the quarter-end reporting deadline, producing widespread glare and reduced visibility. The Service advises residents that praise arriving in identical five-sentence cells, each opening with the words 'I was skeptical at first,' is consistent with synthetic outflow rather than genuine satisfaction. Verified-purchase markers continue to corrode in affected zones. Shoppers should anchor expectations and avoid sailing on a star average alone.

regional_outlook.conditions: Saturated. Five-star praise is falling at rates exceeding the install count, a meteorological impossibility under honest conditions. Expect glowing reviews dated before the app shipped.
Heavy testimonial fog drifting through handmade listings, much of it praising 'fast shipping' on items still listed as made-to-order. Visibility low in the candle and tote sectors.
Persistent 'best of 2026' roundup haze, regenerated hourly, ranking products by which vendor signed the affiliate agreement most recently.
Algorithmically pleasant ambient sludge pooling in playlist gutters; artists with no biography and no photograph accumulating plays at a steady, suspiciously uniform drizzle.
Quarter-end reflection front building. Scattered 'as Q2 closes, I'm humbled' systems expected to intensify by Tuesday afternoon.

specimen.status: Abundant; population spikes within seventy-two hours of any reporting deadline.
specimen.habitat: Review fields beneath products of unknown provenance, particularly chargers, supplements, and budget electronics on the App Store Flats and Etsy Hollows.
specimen.field_marks: Uniform five-star plumage. Opens with 'I was skeptical at first' and closes with 'highly recommend!!' Refers to the product only by category, never by name. Often arrives in flocks of forty within the same hour.
specimen.call: I was skeptical at first but this product exceeded all my expectations and arrived faster than expected, would buy again for my whole family, highly recommend!!
specimen.confusion_species: Easily mistaken for a genuinely delighted customer. The honest reviewer mentions a specific flaw, a specific use, or a specific Tuesday; the Specter mentions only its own prior skepticism and its sweeping, frictionless joy.

spotter_tip: Sort by the most critical reviews first. Slop colonies cannot survive in the one-star wetlands, where actual humans go to describe exactly how the thing broke.
tomorrow: Quarter-end reflection slop surges across the LinkedIn Plateau at midnight; humbled-and-grateful conditions developing into Wednesday.
